name: Janes' Pumpkin Chiffon Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Unflavored gelatin (enough to gel 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg yolks, half the sugar, pumpkin, milk, salt, and spice in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Cook until thick.
3. In a separate bowl, soak gelatin in cold water for 5 minutes, then dissolve it with 1/4 cup of cold water.
4. Add the dissolved gelatin mixture to the cooled pumpkin mixture, which has been removed from heat.
5. Mix gently and allow to cool.
6. When thickened, beat egg whites until foamy.
7. Gradually add remaining sugar to the egg whites, beating until stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the beaten egg white mixture into the pumpkin mixture.
9. Pour the batter into a 9-inch baked pastry shell (or quiche dish).
10. Chill until set.
11. Garnish with whipped cream before serving.
